name: p3-stream-chat-transpile
description: P3 streaming chat middleware transpiled for Node.js with jco

scripts.build:guest: cargo build --release --target wasm32-wasip1 --manifest-path guest/Cargo.toml && jco new guest/target/wasm32-wasip1/release/p3-stream-chat.wasm --wasi-reactor -o p3-stream-chat.wasm
scripts.transpile: jco transpile p3-stream-chat.wasm -o dist --name p3-stream-chat --instantiation async --async-mode jspi --strict
scripts.build: pnpm run build:guest && pnpm run transpile && pnpm run build:ts:demo
scripts.all-with-build: pnpm build && pnpm run build:ts:demo && pnpm run demo
scripts.all: pnpm transpile && pnpm run build:ts:demo && pnpm run demo
